allow: Bash(echo "=== ACT 1 ===" && echo "Nodes:" && grep -c "^\\s*{" src/data/story/domain1/act1.ts | head -1 && grep -oP "id: '[^']+'" src/data/story/domain1/act1.ts | wc -l && echo "Scenes \(by SCENE comments\):" && grep -ciP "SCENE \\d" src/data/story/domain1/act1.ts && echo "=== ACT 2 ===" && grep -oP "id: '[^']+'" src/data/story/domain1/act2.ts | wc -l && echo "Scenes:" && grep -ciP "SCENE \\d" src/data/story/domain1/act2.ts && echo "=== ACT 4 ===" && grep -oP "id: '[^']+'" src/data/story/domain1/act4.ts | wc -l && echo "Scenes:" && grep -ciP "SCENE \\d" src/data/story/domain1/act4.ts)
